messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0074",
  "title": "2024年",
  "page_index": 21,
  "page_range": "21"
}

Section text:
### 2024年
- 1-10名收入占比：23.17%
- 11-50名收入占比：22.76%
- 51-200名收入占比：27.68%
- 其他移动游戏收入占比：26.39%

message.content: This section provides 2024 statistical metrics on mobile game revenue distribution by ranking tier. It answers questions regarding market concentration and revenue share across specific rank brackets: top 1–10 games (23.17%), ranks 11–50 (22.76%), ranks 51–200 (27.68%), and all other mobile games (26.39%). The content is purely data-driven, serving as evidence for queries about 2024 mobile gaming industry financial distribution, rank-based revenue allocation, and market fragmentation. Evidence type: Statistical metrics. No definitions, procedures, tables, or figures are included.
